NWS DAMAGE SURVEY HAS CONCLUDED THAT AN EF1 TORNADO OCCURRED NORTH OF NEW CARLISLE IN CLARK COUNTY, OH ON FEBRUARY 27, 2023. THE TORNADO STARTED AT 319 PM, WITH THE HIGHEST INTENSITY WINDS OF 90-95 MPH OCCURING AT 320 PM. THE TORNADO DISSIPATED AROUND 321 PM.
